content:
# Session 17 (iter-017) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/RiemannRoch/OcOfD.lean` (single prover lane, S3 G2/G3 cokernel leaves).
- OcOfD in-scope cokernel-leaf sorry: **2 + 1 compile-error ‚Üí 1** (build now green: `lean_diagnostic_messages` errors `[]`).
- OcOfD whole-file body `sorry` count: 6 unchanged in raw count, but G3 went error‚Üíclosed and G2 bare-sorry‚Üíreduced. Remaining: G2 residue (L1509), off-cone singlePoint (L771), bridge (L1722), 2 ses corners (L1863/1869).
- Targets: G3 `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` (SOLVED), G2 `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (PARTIAL), G3 def `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` (already sorry-free), new helper `stalkFunctor_map_carrierPresheaf_le_hom_epi_of_ne` (SOLVED, axiom-clean).

## G3 `cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` ‚Äî SOLVED (body sorry-free; transitive G2 sorry only)
`lean_verify` axioms = `[propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`; the `sorryAx` is **only** transitive via G2 ‚Äî the proof body itself is sorry-free (confirmed by lean-auditor first-hand).

- **P.point branch ‚Äî Attempt 1 FAILED (compile error).** The scaffold built `heq : ‚Ä¶ = G2.hom ‚â´ inv (adj.counit.app A)`; the `CategoryTheory.inv (adj.counit.app A)` in the *statement type* could not synthesize `IsIso (adj.counit.app A)` (hard error) even with a local `haveI hcounit`.
- **P.point branch ‚Äî Attempt 2 FIX.** Dropped `inv`-in-type. Kept `htri : (forget ‚ãô stalkFunctor P.point).map csh ‚â´ adj.counit.app A = G2.hom` (from `homEquiv_counit` + `symm_apply_apply`) and concluded via `IsIso.of_isIso_fac_right (f := adj.counit.app A) htri`. **Passing `f` by name was required** for the instance to resolve. `IsIso (counit.app A)` via `skyscraperPresheafStalkOfSpecializes P.point A specializes_rfl` (rfl rewrite) + `infer_instance`.
- **away-from-P branch ‚Äî Attempt 3 (from bare `sorry`).** Both stalks vanish ‚áí `Limits.IsZero.isIso`. Target: `skyscraperPresheafStalkOfNotSpecializesIsTerminal P.point A hns |>.isZero`, with `hns : ¬¨ P.point ‚§≥ x` from `specializes_iff_mem_closure` + `IsClosed.closure_eq` of `{P.point}` (closed by `isClosed_singleton_of_coheight_eq_one ‚Ä¶ krullDim_curve_le_one`). Source: `G = Sheaf.forget ‚ãô stalkFunctor x` is a left adjoint, preserves cokernel; `G.map f` epi (new helper) ‚áí `cokernel(G.map f) = 0`; `IsZero (G.obj (cokernel f))` via `PreservesCokernel.iso G f`.
  - **GOTCHAS (reusable):** `cokernelComparison f G` / `instIsIsoCokernelComparison` FAIL to synth `G.PreservesZeroMorphisms` *inside the term* (standalone `inferInstance` succeeds ‚Äî elaboration-order/universe friction on the sheaf category). The link `PreservesColimitsOfShape J G ‚Üí PreservesColimit (parallelPair f 0) G` does NOT fire via `inferInstance`. WORKAROUND: `haveI hpcs : PreservesColimitsOfShape WalkingParallelPair G := inferInstance; haveI hpc2 := hpcs.preservesColimit` (explicit projection from the *named* `hpcs`); then `PreservesCokernel.iso G f` elaborates cleanly, giving `G.obj (cokernel f) ‚âÖ cokernel (G.map f)` (correct direction for `IsZero.of_iso`).

## G2 `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` ‚Äî PARTIAL (one focused residue sorry, L1509)
- **Attempt 1:** `G = forget ‚ãô stalkFunctor P.point` preserves the cokernel, so `refine PreservesCokernel.iso G f ‚â™‚â´ ?_` (PROVEN, compiles) reduces the goal to the algebraic residue statement `cokernel (G.map f) ‚âÖ ModuleCat.of kbar kbar`.
- **Remaining `sorry` (L1509):** that cokernel ‚âÖ kÃÑ. Two substantial dedicated developments, neither cheap:
  1. naturality: under `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq D P` / `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq (single P 1 + D) P`, the stalk map `G.map f` equals `Submodule.inclusion (orderAtPSubmodule D P ‚â§ orderAtPSubmodule (single P 1+D) P)` ‚Äî needs tracing `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup`;
  2. DVR quotient `(œÄ^{-(n+1)}ùí™)/(œÄ^{-n}ùí™) ‚âÖ ùí™/ùî™ ‚âÖ kÃÑ` (multiply by œÄ^{n+1}, kÃÑ-linear automorphism of K(C), then `residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one`).

## New helper `stalkFunctor_map_carrierPresheaf_le_hom_epi_of_ne` (L1417) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
Stalk map of the carrier inclusion is epi (surjective) away from P: germ rep on small open V ‚àã x with P.point ‚àâ V where the two carrier submodules coincide (`carrierSubmoduleSheaf_add_single_eq_of_not_mem`); lifted via `stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply` + `germ_res_apply`. **Real driver of the away-from-P half of G3** (replaces the blueprint's section-iso route). **Coverage debt: no blueprint entry** (lvb-ocofd MAJOR; flagged for planner).

## Key findings / patterns
- **Adjunction-transpose realises the residue-evaluation morphism.** G3 def = `homEquiv` transpose of G2.hom under `stalkSkyscraperSheafAdjunction P.point`; the blueprint's "leading-Laurent-coefficient mod ùî™" prose IS this transpose (unit sends germ ‚Üí its stalk-map image). Avoids any explicit stalkwise residue construction.
- **`IsIso.of_isIso_fac_right (f := ‚Ä¶)`** ‚Äî for a triangle `g ‚â´ h = k` with `h`,`k` iso, conclude `IsIso g`; **name `f` explicitly** or instance synthesis stalls.
- **Left-adjoint cokernel preservation needs manual instance threading** (see GOTCHAS above) ‚Äî `PreservesCokernel.iso` works where `cokernelComparison` does not.

## Subagents (both 0 must-fix)
- **lean-auditor/iter017** (`logs/iter-017/lean-auditor-iter017-report.md`): 0 critical / 4 major / 5 minor. G3 genuinely sorry-free (P.point: adjunction triangle + 2-out-of-3; away: epi-helper + `isZero_cokernel_of_epi`). G2: one honest isolated `sorry` (L1509). **No excuse-comments, no sorry-hiding, no fake assembly.** 4 majors = stale docstrings (see Documentation-rot below).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd** (`logs/iter-017/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-ocofd-report.md`): Faithful, **no must-fix**. G2 blueprint coverage ADEQUATE (full œÄ^{n+1}¬∑/residue recipe). 1 major = new-helper coverage debt; 2 minor = stale `\uses` divergence in `_isIso` away-from-P sketch (cites `carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem`, Lean uses epi-on-stalk helper) ‚Äî annotated by me with `% NOTE:`.

## Documentation-rot (LOW; review cannot edit `.lean`) ‚Äî for next OcOfD prover
Stale docstrings carried + worsened (lean-auditor 4 majors): (a) `sheafOf` docstring L606‚Äì633 + inline L660 still claim a residual sorry though `sheafOf` body is sorry-free; (b) S3 header L1025 still marks `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` "STUBBED" (closed iter-016); (c) `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` docstring L1625‚Äì1693 still calls the decl a "Deep gap" listing G1/G2/G3 all open, though G1+G3 closed. Comment-only cleanup owed.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex`, `lem:cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso` proof block: added `% NOTE:` (iter-017) recording the away-from-P route divergence (Lean uses new epi-on-stalk helper + `isZero_cokernel_of_epi`, not `carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem`) and the P.point adjunction-triangle route, plus the new-helper coverage debt. No `\leanok` overrides.
- No `\leanok` override needed: G2 statement-`\leanok` + proof-unmarked is correct (G2 body has a sorry); G3 def/lemma statement-`\leanok` and `_isIso` proof-`\leanok` are correct (G3 body genuinely sorry-free per first-hand audit; transitive G2 incompleteness is carried by G2's unmarked proof). sync_leanok ran at iter-017 (sha 372e350, +1/‚àí0).
- No `\mathlibok` warranted; no `\lean{...}` rename (all pins resolve, `dag-query unmatched` shows the new helper as the sole OcOfD coverage-debt node).
